title: Colombo & Hurd, PL - Leading US Immigration Law Firm
content:
## U.S. Immigration Law Firm For the World’s Best and Brightest
Helping professionals, founders, and investors achieve their immigration goals with integrity, excellence, and life-changing results

## More than 20 years of Excellence — U.S. Immigration Law Firm

## Immigration Services
We provide strategic immigration solutions for professionals, investors, and entrepreneurs, specializing in self-sponsored green cards, investor visas, and complex immigration matters. Our experienced team delivers personalized, high-impact representation to help clients achieve lasting success in the United States.

### Immigration for Professionals

### Immigration for Investors

### Federal Immigration Litigation

### Corporate Concierge Immigration Services

## About Immigration Attorneys for High-Skilled Professionals
At Colombo & Hurd, we help talented individuals achieve their immigration goals. Recognized with an AV rating from Martindale-Hubbell (the highest recognition for legal skill) and an A+ BBB rating, our attorneys are frequently featured in major new outlets as trusted voices in immigration law.
As a U.S. immigration law firm founded by immigrants, we bring unique insight and empathy to every case. Our diverse team truly understands the immigrant experience—many of our attorneys and staff have been through the process themselves. More than just a law firm, we are partners and advocates for the innovators, visionaries, and leaders shaping America’s future.
Trusted around the world by professionals, investors, and families
Proven results in securing visas & green cards
Representing professionals, investors, and businesses
Focused on one mission: delivering life-changing immigration results

## What Clients Say About Our Immigration Lawyers

### Excellent support throughout the entire process
Excellent support throughout the entire process. They explained everything to us in great detail and constantly advised us throughout the process. Thanks to them, we now have approval.

### The best decision of 2024 for my family and me
The best decision of 2024 for my family and me was choosing Colombo & Hurd. Professionalism, expertise, responsibility, and results. 100% recommended.

### Within 7 months, I had my EB2 approved for national interest
The process was excellent!!! Within 7 months, I had my EB2 approved for national interest and in the next 7 months, I had my green card in my hands!!! Communication was always good, and they helped me with everything, I recommend them 100%!!

### Amazing team with outstanding professionalism
Amazing team with outstanding professionalism. They genuinely communicate clearly at every level of the process.

## Insights & Resources

## Your Success is our Success Helping Thousands Achieve Their American Dream

### EB-2 NIW Case Study: Bioinformatics Expert From Netherlands Approval
Colombo & Hurd Senior Immigration Attorney Vivian Daher highlights the strategic approach used to secure EB-2 NIW approval for a Dutch bioinformatics expert seeking to revolutionize software frameworks for the U.S. biotechnology sector.
